markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between HeyGen and fwd.digital for content marketing and SEO growth](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Nav (HeyGen) seeks to rapidly scale content/SEO, aiming to 5x traffic by January](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Marcel (fwd.digital) proposes full-service content creation (\~100k words/month) for $9k/month](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Initial focus on creating a tools directory, then expanding to blog content](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Goal to start publishing within 1-2 weeks, aiming for aggressive growth](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)

## Topics

### HeyGen's Growth Goals

  - [Target: 5x traffic growth by end of January](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Current metrics: \~1M monthly users, 400k monthly signups](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Primary focus: Owning categories around video creation, generation, translation](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Need to improve rankings for key terms like "AI video translation"](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Two-pronged approach:](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
    1.  Tools directory (priority)
    2.  Blog content
  - [Aim to replicate success of competitors like Descript (900k monthly visits, 80% from blog)](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Focus on both high-intent keywords and long-tail content](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Potential topics: screen recording, video translation, AI avatars, lip-syncing](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [Current website on Webflow, new design launching soon](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Nikon (contractor) to help with frontend development](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Considering simple template similar to Bardeen for quick implementation](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Need for custom graphics/imagery for tools directory](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)

### Partnership Details

  - [fwd.digital to provide:](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [Dedicated content team (7 full-time, 20+ freelancers)](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Content creation (\~100k words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [SEO strategy and implementation](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [3-month initial engagement proposed at $9k/month](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Aim to start publishing within 1-2 weeks of kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)

### Content Quality and Brand Voice

  - [Nav concerned about maintaining HeyGen's voice and product relevance](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Marcel assures quality control through experienced editors](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Canva suggested as a reference for desired brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)
  - [fwd.digital to use AI tools + human editing for efficiency and quality](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send SOW (Statement of Work) shortly after the call](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=2448.0)
  - [Nav to seek internal approval, aiming for Monday kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel for project communication](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)
  - [Nav to discuss with new creative director about brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=2189.0)
  - [Marcel to propose ambitious growth targets for first 1-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=2426.0)
  - [Determine template for tools directory (possibly similar to Bardeen)](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Begin parallel tracks for tools directory and blog content creation](https://fathom.video/share/cMVes-tybbDsqDRmKDruePqgWwYQvsF6?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
